name: Tongxing Environmental Protection Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Tongxing Environmental Protection Technology Co.,Ltd provides environmental protection project general contracting services in China. It offers environmental protection equipment and materials for dust removal, desulfurization, and denitrification; salt extraction products; desulfurization waste liquid extraction salt; and low temperature denitration catalyst, as well as related ancillary services. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Hefei, China.
